content.description: Sign-on policy evaluations, routing rule hits, MFA factor usage and failures.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>Okta: MFA Monitor</label>
    <description>MFA challenge outcomes, factor usage breakdown, failures by user, and enrollment activity.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[{"title": "Okta: MFA Monitor", "description": "MFA challenge outcomes, factor usage breakdown, failures by user, and enrollment activity.", "inputs": {"input_global_trp": {"options": {"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now", "token": "global_time"}, "title": "Time Range", "type": "input.timerange"}}, "defaults": {"dataSources": {"ds.search": {"options": {"queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}}}}, "visualizations": {"viz_mfa_total": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_total"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "MFA Challenges", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_mfa_fail": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_fail"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c12f28"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Failures", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_mfa_abandon": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_abandon"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#d06a00"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Abandoned", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_mfa_rate": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_rate"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c12f28"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Failure Rate %", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_mfa_trend": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_trend"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "MFA Challenges Over Time", "type": "splunk.column"}, "viz_factor_pie": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_factor_pie"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Factor Breakdown", "type": "splunk.pie"}, "viz_fail_detail": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_fail_detail"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Failures by User & Factor", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_enrollment": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_enrollment"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Enrollment Activity", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_recent_fail": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_recent_fail"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Recent MFA Failures", "type": "splunk.table"}}, "dataSources": {"ds_mfa_total": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_fail": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | where outcome=\"FAILURE\" | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_abandon": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | where outcome IN (\"ABANDONED\",\"UNANSWERED\") | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_rate": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | stats count as total sum(eval(if(outcome=\"FAILURE\",1,0))) as fails | eval rate=if(total>0,round(fails/total*100,1),0) | table rate", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_trend": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | eval success=if(outcome=\"SUCCESS\",1,0) | eval fail=if(outcome=\"FAILURE\",1,0) | eval abandon=if(outcome IN (\"ABANDONED\",\"UNANSWERED\"),1,0) | timechart span=1d sum(success) AS Success sum(fail) AS Failures sum(abandon) AS Abandoned", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_factor_pie": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=factor path=\"debugContext.debugData.factor\" | eval factor=case(lower(factor)=\"push\" OR factor=\"OKTA_VERIFY_PUSH\",\"Okta Verify Push\",lower(factor)=\"signed_nonce\" OR factor=\"SIGNED_NONCE\",\"Passkey / FIDO2\",factor=\"PASSWORD_AS_FACTOR\",\"Password\",factor=\"OKTA_SOFT_TOKEN\",\"TOTP\",isnotnull(factor),factor,1=1,\"Unknown\") | stats count by factor | rename factor AS Factor, count AS Count", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_fail_detail": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=factor path=\"debugContext.debugData.factor\" | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=actor path=\"actor.alternateId\" | where outcome!=\"SUCCESS\" | eval factor=case(lower(factor)=\"push\" OR factor=\"OKTA_VERIFY_PUSH\",\"Okta Verify Push\",lower(factor)=\"signed_nonce\" OR factor=\"SIGNED_NONCE\",\"Passkey / FIDO2\",factor=\"PASSWORD_AS_FACTOR\",\"Password\",factor=\"OKTA_SOFT_TOKEN\",\"TOTP\",isnotnull(factor),factor,1=1,\"Unknown\") | stats count as failures by actor, factor, outcome | sort -failures | head 20 | rename actor AS User, factor AS Factor, outcome AS Outcome, failures AS Failures", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_enrollment": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType IN (user.mfa.factor.activate,user.mfa.factor.deactivate,user.mfa.factor.reset_all) | spath output=actor path=\"actor.alternateId\" | eval action=case(eventType=\"user.mfa.factor.activate\",\"Enrolled\",eventType=\"user.mfa.factor.deactivate\",\"Deactivated\",eventType=\"user.mfa.factor.reset_all\",\"Reset All\",1=1,eventType) | stats count by actor, action | sort -count | head 20 | rename actor AS User, action AS Action, count AS Count", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_recent_fail": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_mfa | spath output=factor path=\"debugContext.debugData.factor\" | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=actor path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | where outcome!=\"SUCCESS\" | eval factor=case(lower(factor)=\"push\" OR factor=\"OKTA_VERIFY_PUSH\",\"Okta Verify Push\",lower(factor)=\"signed_nonce\" OR factor=\"SIGNED_NONCE\",\"Passkey / FIDO2\",factor=\"PASSWORD_AS_FACTOR\",\"Password\",factor=\"OKTA_SOFT_TOKEN\",\"TOTP\",isnotnull(factor),factor,1=1,\"Unknown\") | eval time=strftime(_time,\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\") | table time, actor, app, factor, outcome | sort -time | head 25 | rename time AS Time, actor AS User, app AS Application, factor AS Factor, outcome AS Outcome", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}}, "layout": {"globalInputs": ["input_global_trp"], "layoutDefinitions": {"layout_1": {"options": {"display": "auto", "height": 1310, "width": 2100}, "structure": [{"item": "viz_mfa_total", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 0, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_fail", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 520, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_abandon", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 1040, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_rate", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 540, "x": 1560, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_trend", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 2100, "x": 0, "y": 170}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_factor_pie", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 700, "x": 0, "y": 540}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_fail_detail", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 1390, "x": 710, "y": 540}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_enrollment", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1040, "x": 0, "y": 930}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_recent_fail", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 1050, "x": 1050, "y": 930}, "type": "block"}], "type": "absolute"}}, "tabs": {"items": [{"label": "MFA Monitor", "layoutId": "layout_1"}]}}}]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: Okta: Policy & MFA Monitor
